ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(Stage__c, "Customer Service & Complaints"), OR( AND( TEXT(Payment_Type__c) = "Villas", OR( ISBLANK(Main_Door__c), ISBLANK(Main_Door_Sensor_No_of_Keys__c), ISBLANK(Guest_Bedroom_Key_No__c), ISBLANK(Guest_Bedroom_No_of_Keys__c), ISBLANK(FF_Master_bedroom_Key_No__c), ISBLANK(FF_Master_bedroom_No_Of_Keys__c), ISBLANK(Sit_Out_Key_No__c), ISBLANK(Sit_Out_No_of_Keys__c), ISBLANK(FF_children_bedroom_Key_No__c), ISBLANK(FF_children_bedroom_No_Of_Keys__c), ISBLANK(Second_Floor_Key_No__c), ISBLANK(Second_Floor_No_of_Keys__c) ) ), AND( TEXT(Payment_Type__c) = "Apartments", OR( ISBLANK(Main_Door__c), ISBLANK(Main_Door_Sensor_No_of_Keys__c), ISBLANK(FF_Master_bedroom_Key_No__c), ISBLANK(FF_Master_bedroom_No_Of_Keys__c), ISBLANK(FF_children_bedroom_Key_No__c), ISBLANK(FF_children_bedroom_No_Of_Keys__c), ISBLANK(Common_Bedroom_Key_No__c), ISBLANK(Common_Bedroom_No_of_Keys__c) ) ), AND( TEXT(Payment_Type__c) = "Row House", OR( ISBLANK(Main_Door_Key_No__c), ISBLANK(Main_Door_No_of_Keys__c), ISBLANK(Guest_Bedroom_Key_No__c), ISBLANK(Guest_Bedroom_No_of_Keys__c), ISBLANK(FF_Master_bedroom_Key_No__c), ISBLANK(FF_Master_bedroom_No_Of_Keys__c), ISBLANK(FF_children_bedroom_Key_No__c), ISBLANK(FF_children_bedroom_No_Of_Keys__c), ISBLANK(Basement_Door_Key_No__c), ISBLANK(Basement_Door_No_of_Keys__c), ISBLANK(Second_Floor_Key_No__c), ISBLANK(Second_Floor_No_of_Keys__c) ) ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: All key-related fields must be filled before changing Stage to Customer Service & Complaints.
